query:
SELECT u.id AS userId, u.name, u.username, COUNT(*) AS completedEvents
FROM station_events se
JOIN users u ON u.id = se.operatorUserId
WHERE se.stationCode = 'D'
  AND se.stationEventType = 'complete'
  AND se.countForProductivity = 1
  AND DATE_FORMAT(se.businessDate, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m')
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.username
ORDER BY completedEvents DESC;

SELECT u.id AS userId, u.name, u.username, COUNT(*) AS detailRows, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(psd.earnedPoints), 0), 4) AS totalPoints
FROM productivity_score_details psd
JOIN users u ON u.id = psd.userId
WHERE psd.stationCode = 'D'
  AND DATE_FORMAT(psd.businessDate, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m')
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.username
ORDER BY detailRows DESC;

SELECT u.id AS userId, u.name, u.username
FROM users u
WHERE u.name LIKE '%巧克力%' OR u.username LIKE '%巧克力%' OR u.name LIKE '%choco%' OR u.username LIKE '%choco%' OR u.name LIKE '%Chocolate%' OR u.username LIKE '%Chocolate%';
